scripts.dev: sh -c 'npm run setup-public && npm run server & server=$!; trap "kill $server" EXIT INT TERM; npx remotion studio'
scripts.studio: npm run setup-public && npx remotion studio
scripts.render:timeline: npm run setup-public && npx remotion render Timeline ../output/render.mp4
scripts.render:composition: npm run setup-public && npx remotion render CompositionVideo --codec=vp8 --image-format=png --output=../inputs/output_composition.webm
